title: Pearl Trail
description: Advanced Ender Pearl trajectory prediction with smooth animated gradients and deep customization
body:
# ▶️What Is It?
**Visual improvements to the ender pearls and a lot of useful functionality related to pearls**
- cool visuals for ender pearls
- predicting the flight and landing time of pearls
- modern menu where you can set up anything you want (bind "-" (minus))

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1531193ec6978c9095ab12154788a34976d31a2e_0.webp)

# 💫Visuals
- A Sphere covering the pearls for better visibility at night
- Gradient Trail following the pearls
- Flight prediction, when pearl in your hand
- Predicting the time that the pearls will fly
- Mark on place, where the pearl will land
- Color the elements of visuals with different colors
- You can disable anything you want, if you're tired of it
- Customizable sizes off all the elements
- Customizable gradient trail
- Special Feature: Counter-Pearl Guide
- Config Manager
- RGB Color Picker

![gradient](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c6e9450939231ad080cbad449bdb22b9714bd07.gif)

![menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9961ba444dabe355fcc62c3dcc6d631840164221.png)

## ℹ️How To Install:
1. Install Fabric 1.21.4 (+Latest version)
2. Install Fabric Api 1.21.4
3. Download PearlTrail
4. Put Fabric Api and PearlTrail to your mods folder

## ⚙️Not Working?
Try this:
1. check the versions of the mod and fabric api
2. check the version of the game (needed Fabric 1.21.4)
3. try to launch only Fabric Api and PearlTrail
4. install java 21
5. try another game launcher
